title: Clean Power 2030 Action Plan: solar capacity update - letter to NESO
body: "The Minister for Energy has written to the National Energy System Operator (NESO) to advise that government is republishing the connections reform annex of the Clean Power 2030 Action Plan. The update is intended to address a misalignment between solar capacity allocations and the solar pipeline for 2031 to 2035.  This technical update will enable NESO to allocate network capacity to the most well-developed solar projects across transmission and distribution in each region. The overall solar capacity allocation remains as in the original publication.  "
